title: Brazilian Chicken Fritters
description: Rich and chewy Brazilian chicken fritters made with chicken stock cube and deep fried to perfection, this dish is a low sodium friendly option.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, blend the chicken breast, chicken stock cube, onion, and garlic until well combined.
In a large bowl, whisk together the egg, flour, and cornstarch.
Add the blended chicken mixture to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Cover the dough and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
